---
title: "raven_proxy.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/harness/raven_proxy.py"
loc: 23
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.67
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 8.36
overall_score: 6.17
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating RavenProxy, __init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 17 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `RavenProxy`
- `__init__`
- `send_payload`
